etymology.description: 屮(屮) (chè, 'sprout') + 六(六) (liù, 'six') = sprout with phonetic 六 -> proto-form related to surpass
etymology.interpretation: This character combines 屮(屮) (chè, 'sprout') as the semantic component with 六(六) (liù, 'six') for its phonetic aspect. It represents the early form of the idea related to 'climbing' or 'surpassing', which eventually evolved into 夌(夌) (líng). As the character 夌 became the established form, 𡴆 fell out of use.
